commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 13:2 He reigned three years in Jerusalem. His mother's name also was Micaiah the daughter of Uriel of Gibeah. And there was war between Abijah and Jeroboam. Douay Rheims 1609 I therefore have sent thee a man wise and most skillful Hiram, (a) my father, (a) It is probable, that this man had instructed the king of Tyre in true religion of one God whom he confesseth. and that therefore the king called him his father.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Michaia, alias Maacha. Her father had also two names; viz., Absalom or Abessalom, and Uriel. (Challoner)
Many had two names. (Tirinus)
Of Gabaa, may refer to the women.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Michaia: Alias Maacha. Her father had also two names, viz., Absalom, or Abessalom, and Uriel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
